googleCalendar.title: Connect Google Calendar
googleCalendar.subtitle: Sync your Mezonly lessons with Google Calendar automatically.
googleCalendar.needsReconnectNotice: Your Google Calendar session for {email} has expired. Reconnect to keep syncing lessons.

items.autoSync: New lessons appear on your Google Calendar automatically.
items.reminders: Use Google Calendar reminders so you never miss a session.
items.availability: Busy times from Google Calendar can help protect your schedule.

disconnectConfirm.title: Disconnect Google Calendar?
disconnectConfirm.description: New lessons will no longer sync to Google Calendar. Existing events will not be removed automatically.

toast.connectSuccessDescription: Your lessons can now sync to Google Calendar.
toast.connectFailedDescription: Please try again in a moment.
toast.disconnectSuccessDescription: Your account is no longer linked.
toast.syncSuccessDescription: Your upcoming Mezonly lessons are now on Google Calendar.
toast.syncFailedDescription: Please try again in a moment.
